request.description: This endpoint returns a paginated list of available crawlers, each containing its configuration, input parameters, and output fields.

response.name: Example

request.description: This endpoint retrieves detailed information about a specific crawler using its hash ID. It will help you understand each crawler's availability, cost, parameters, and potential issues before using it. | Field | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **name** | string | The human-readable name of the crawler (e.g., "Google Maps Search Export"). | | **is_public** | boolean | `true` if the crawler is publicly accessible. | | **is_available** | boolean | `true` if the crawler is available for runs. If `false`, it might be temporarily paused. | | **is_premium** | boolean | `true` if this crawler requires a premium subscription or extra credits. | | **has_issues** | boolean | `true` if the crawler is currently experiencing issues (often due to third-party website changes). Runs are paused until fixed. | | **max_concurrency** | integer | Maximum number of concurrent requests the crawler can handle in a run. | | **credits_per_row** | integer | The number of credits charged per result row collected by this crawler. | | **input** | array | A list of input parameters that can be configured when running this crawler. Includes task-level and squid-level parameters. | | **result** | array | A list of result fields/columns this crawler will collect and return in the output. | ## Understanding the `input` Object ### Task-level inputs Task-level inputs are used per URL or task you submit in a run. These fields help the crawler know what specific data or page to scrape. | Field | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **name** | string | The parameter name (e.g., `url`). | | **regex** | string | Optional regex pattern to validate the input. | | **default** | any | Default value if none is provided. | | **example** | string | Example value to guide the user (e.g., a Google Maps search URL). | | **required** | boolean | Indicates if this field is mandatory for the task. | | **description** | string | A detailed description of what the input is used for. | To execute the crawler, you must provide tasks using one of the following methods: - [Add Tasks](#57098d0c-5ab7-44e3-953e-4bb746c66dcb) - [Upload Tasks](#36fdefb6-d37a-4dc3-8bd7-69fd56f608cd) ### Squid-Level inputs Squid-level inputs control the overall run behavior or enable specific features that might impact cost and data collection. | Field | Type | Description | | --- | --- | --- | | **name** | string | The parameter name (e.g., `collect_contacts`). | | **default** | any | Default value if not provided. | | **display** | string | Friendly display name for frontend UI. | | **function** | boolean | `true` indicates the parameter is a `function` and needs to be added to `functions` . | | **priority** | integer | Priority of the function execution (used by backend). | | **required** | boolean | Indicates if this parameter is mandatory at squid level. | | **description** | string | A detailed explanation of the parameter’s purpose. | | **cost_description** | string | Explains any extra credit cost associated with enabling this function. | | **credits_per_function** | integer | Number of extra credits charged per row if the function is enabled and successful. | ## Notes - If `has_issues` is `true`, runs are blocked until developers fix the crawler. - `input` helps users understand which parameters must be sent when launching a run. - `result` gives insight into the data that will be returned after a successful run.

response.name: Example
response.body:
{
    "id": "4734d096159ef05210e0e1677e8be823",
    "object": "crawler",
    "account": null,
    "name": "Google Maps Search Export",
    "slug": "google-maps-search-export",
    "icon": "",
    "is_public": true,
    "is_available": true,
    "is_premium": false,
    "has_issues": false,
    "input": [
        {
            "name": "url",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "task",
            "regex": "http(.*)google(.*)/maps/(search|place)(.*)",
            "default": null,
            "example": "https://www.google.com/maps/search/restaurant/@43.2928346,5.3662584,14z",
            "required": false,
            "is_details": false,
            "description": "A string representing the Google Maps Search URL, containing all establishments the crawler will collect."
        },
        {
            "name": "activity",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "task",
            "value": "restaurant",
            "asterix": true,
            "example": "restaurant",
            "required": false,
            "is_params": true,
            "description": "The activity of the search location."
        },
        {
            "name": "country",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "task",
            "value": "United States",
            "asterix": true,
            "example": "United States",
            "required": false,
            "is_params": true,
            "description": "The country of the search location."
        },
        {
            "name": "admin_1",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "task",
            "value": "Bretagne",
            "example": "Bretagne",
            "required": false,
            "is_params": true,
            "description": "The administrative 1 section of the search location."
        },
        {
            "name": "admin_2",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "task",
            "value": "Finistère",
            "example": "Finistère",
            "required": false,
            "is_params": true,
            "description": "The administrative 2 section of the search location."
        },
        {
            "name": "city",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "task",
            "value": "Ablon",
            "asterix": true,
            "example": "Ablon",
            "required": false,
            "is_params": true,
            "description": "The city of the search location."
        },
        {
            "max": 200,
            "name": "max_results",
            "type": "int",
            "level": "squid",
            "default": 200,
            "example": 200,
            "required": false,
            "is_details": true,
            "description": "Google Maps restricts search results to a maximum of 200. To access a larger dataset, consider utilizing our URL generator, which segments your search into multiple URLs for extended reach."
        },
        {
            "name": "collect_contacts",
            "type": "boolean",
            "level": "squid",
            "default": true,
            "display": "Collect Emails",
            "function": true,
            "priority": 3,
            "required": false,
            "is_details": true,
            "description": "Extract email addresses from the business’s website.",
            "credits_per_function": 10
        },
        {
            "name": "details",
            "type": "boolean",
            "level": "squid",
            "default": false,
            "display": "Collect Details",
            "example": true,
            "function": true,
            "priority": 1,
            "required": false,
            "is_details": true,
            "description": "Extract attributes like plus_code, poi, health, and last_opening_hours_updated_at.",
            "credits_per_function": 10
        },
        {
            "name": "ratings",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "squid",
            "allowed": [
                "Any rating",
                "2.0+",
                "2.5+",
                "3.0+",
                "3.5+",
                "4.0+",
                "4.5+"
            ],
            "default": "Any rating",
            "example": "Any rating",
            "required": false,
            "description": "Filter places based on their average rating."
        },
        {
            "name": "images",
            "type": "boolean",
            "level": "squid",
            "default": false,
            "depends": "details",
            "display": "Collect Images",
            "example": true,
            "function": true,
            "priority": 2,
            "required": false,
            "is_details": true,
            "description": "Collect all business images.",
            "credits_per_function": 10
        },
        {
            "name": "country",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "squid",
            "allowed": [
                "Afghanistan",
                "Albania",
                "Algeria",
                "American Samoa",
                "Andorra",
                "Angola",
                "Antigua & Barbuda",
                "Argentina",

                "Venezuela",
                "Vietnam",
                "Zambia",
                "Zimbabwe"
            ],
            "default": "United States",
            "display": "Search Region",
            "example": "United States",
            "required": false,
            "description": "Defines the geographic location context used by Google Maps when returning your search results. For example, setting this to 'France' ensures that searches are served from a French regional context."
        },
        {
            "name": "language",
            "type": "string",
            "level": "squid",
            "allowed": [
                "Afrikaans",
                "azərbaycan",
                "Bahasa Indonesia",

                "Português (Brasil)",

                "română",
                "shqip",
                "Slovenčina",
                "slovenščina",
                "Suomi",
                "Svenska",
                "Tiếng Việt",
                "Türkçe",
                "Ελληνικά",
                "български",
                "кыргызча",
                "қазақ тілі",
                "македонски",
                "монгол",
                "Русский",
                "српски (ћирилица)",
                "Українська",
                "ქართული",
                "հայերեն",
                "עברית",
                "اردو",
                "العربية",
                "فارسی",
                "አማርኛ",
                "नेपाली",
                "हिन्दी",
                "मराठी",
                "বাংলা",
                "ਪੰਜਾਬੀ",
                "ગુજરાતી",
                "தமிழ்",
                "తెలుగు",
                "ಕನ್ನಡ",
                "മലയാളം",
                "සිංහල",
                "ไทย",
                "ລາວ",
                "ဗမာ",
                "ខ្មែរ",
                "한국어",
                "日本語",
                "简体中文",
                "繁體中文"
            ],
            "default": "English (United States)",
            "display": "Search Language",
            "example": "English (United States)",
            "required": true,
            "description": "Specifies the language Google Maps will use to display search results and related information (such as place names, descriptions, etc.)."
        }
    ],
    "result": [
        "zero_x",
        "cid",
        "url",
        "name",
        "address",
        "country_name",
        "country_code",
        "zip_code",
        "city",
        "lat",
        "lng",
        "ratings",
        "score",
        "category",
        "main_image_url",
        "phone",
        "website",
        "menu",
        "plus_code",
        "is_temporarily_closed",
        "is_permanently_closed",
        "has_owner",
        "opening_hours",
        "poi",
        "description",
        "price",
        "last_opening_hours_updated_at",
        "images_count",
        "images",
        "health",
        "about",
        "email",
        "facebook",
        "instagram",
        "additional_phone"
    ],
    "max_concurrency": 20,
    "extra_params": {
        "use_params": false
    },
    "credits_per_row": 1
}

request.description: This endpoint returns the available parameters and their configurations specific to the requested crawler. Each crawler type (e.g., Google Maps, LinkedIn, Sales Navigator) will have its own unique set of task and crawler parameters tailored to its scraping capabilities and requirements.

response.name: Example
response.body:
{
    "task": {
        "url": {
            "type": "string",
            "group": "url",
            "regex": "http(.*)google(.*)/maps/(search|place)(.*)",
            "default": null,
            "required": true,
            "attribute": "url",
            "is_params": false
        },
        "city": {
            "type": "string",
            "group": "location",
            "default": null,
            "required": true,
            "attribute": "city",
            "is_params": true
        },
        "region": {
            "type": "string",
            "group": "location",
            "default": null,

            "is_params": true

            "group": "location",

            "is_params": true

        "category": {
